item.title: A message from the Cafeteria-
item.description: The last day for the cafeteria to be open for the school year is May 20th

item.title: A message from: Mrs. Curtis
item.description: Any 7/8 students who signed up for the University of Waterloo Math Contest next week are invited to participate in a practice contest at 11:20 today in 7/8 Resource with Mrs. Curtis. Please bring your lunch, a pencil, and a calculator.

item.title: A message from: Ms. Brennan.
item.description: Students who are volunteering at the Horticultural Society Plant Sale this Saturday are asked to meet briefly in room 201 at the start of lunch today.

item.title: A message from: Mme. Perron
item.description: All Europe team members are encouraged to start collecting new items for our upcoming trivia night silent auction. Please bring new items collected to Mme Perron in room 125 for safe keeping.
